files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-13664-live-migration-fails-to-select-compatible-target-node-based-on-ma",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: Live Migration Fails to Select Compatible Target Node Based on Machine Type",
+    "description": "Live Migration Fails to Select Compatible Target Node Based on Machine Type. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubevirt troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubevirt deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\n**What happened**:\nDuring the live migration of a VM, if the target node does not support the VM's machine type, the migration will fail, even if other nodes support the VM's original machine type."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Live Migration Fails to Select Compatible Target Node Based\u2026",
+        "description": "Before this PR:\nNodes labeled by the node labeller did not include supported machine types. As a result, a Virtual Machine (VM) with a specific machine type could be scheduled on a node that does not support it. This would cause the VM launcher to fail.\n\nAfter this PR:\n* Nodes are now labeled by the node-labeller with all supported machine types available on each node.\n* When `virt-laucnher` pods being created during vmi starts or during migration, they will have a label in the `NodeSelector`\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Live Migration Fails to Select Compatible Target\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Before this PR:\nNodes labeled by the node labeller did not include supported machine types. As a result, a Virtual Machine (VM) with a specific machine type could be scheduled on a node that does not support it. This would cause the VM launcher to fail.\n\nAfter this PR:\n* Nodes are now labeled by the node-labeller with all supported machine types available on each node.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
